seoTitle: How to Add a Blog to Your Gumroad Storefront
metaDescription: Connect blog content to your Gumroad storefront to attract visitors, promote products through posts, and grow your audience with content marketing.
intro: Adding blog-style content around your Gumroad storefront gives you a way to attract organic visitors and guide them toward your products, rather than relying only on direct traffic to your listings. This guide covers connecting blog content to your storefront and using it as a content marketing channel.

steps.heading: Understand how blogging pairs with Gumroad
steps.body: A blog isn't a native Gumroad feature — it works alongside your storefront by driving traffic in and linking back out to your products.

steps.heading: Connect blog content to your storefront
steps.body: Link your existing blog or content platform to your Gumroad storefront so visitors can move easily between the two.

steps.heading: Add product links to your content
steps.body: Include direct links to relevant Gumroad products within your blog posts to convert readers into customers.

steps.heading: Apply content marketing tips
steps.body: Focus on topics your target audience is actually searching for, and consistently tie content back to what you're selling.

faq.question: Does Gumroad have a built-in blogging feature?
faq.answer: Gumroad's storefront isn't primarily a blogging platform, so most creators connect an external blog and link it to their Gumroad products instead.

faq.question: How does blogging help sell more products on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Blog content can attract organic search traffic and build trust with readers before directing them to relevant product links.

faq.question: What kind of content should I write to promote my products?
faq.answer: Content that addresses the same problems your products solve tends to convert best, since it naturally leads readers toward a relevant purchase.

faq.question: Can I link multiple Gumroad products within one blog post?
faq.answer: Yes, you can include links to as many relevant products as make sense within your content.
